process.note: Coarse-grind beef + pork/mutton with pork fat, toasted coriander, vinegar, nutmeg, clove; coil in wide hog casing; grill/braai fresh. Ground blend cook to 71C.

rationale: Classic fresh braai sausage, no cure; salt 1.8% within fresh range.

process.note: Grind pork (+veal) 3mm, season salt/white pepper/nutmeg/mace/ginger/caraway, stuff 32-36mm hog casing; fry or grill fresh. Ground pork/veal cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh German brat, uncured; salt ~1.8% in range (Marianski originals run high, 18 sensible).

process.note: Medium-grind pork (+beef/bacon), season salt/garlic/black pepper/cimbru(savory)/paprika, stuff hog casing; grill/fry fresh. Ground pork/beef cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh Romanian home sausage; salt 20 g/kg = 2.0%, top of sane fresh range but acceptable, kept.

process.ref: Taste of Artisan — Homemade Chicken Sausage
process.note: Grind chicken thigh (keep skin/fat for ~1.5% salt), season salt/pepper/garlic/herbs, stuff or patty; cook fresh. POULTRY -> 74C.

rationale: Fresh poultry sausage, no cure; salt 1.6% in range; cook floor raised context poultry 74C.

process.note: Grind pork shoulder, season sage/thyme/pepper/nutmeg/brown sugar/salt, form patties or loose; pan-fry fresh. Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh sage breakfast sausage, uncured; salt 1.8% in range.

process.ref: Don't Sweat The Recipe — Homemade Italian Sausage
process.note: Coarse-grind pork shoulder, season salt/fennel seed/black pepper/garlic (+chili for hot), optional wine; stuff hog casing; grill/fry fresh. Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh fennel pork sausage, no cure; salt 1.8% in range.

process.note: Grind lamb (or lamb/beef) with fat, mix harissa/paprika/cumin/coriander/fennel/garlic; stuff sheep casing; grill fresh. Ground lamb/beef cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh North African lamb sausage, uncured; salt 1.8% in range (Marianski runs 2.4%, kept 18).

process.note: Coarse-grind pork with fat, garlic-forward, black pepper, summer savory (cimbru), garlic-water; stuff hog casing; grill fresh. Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh Romanian garlic pork sausage, no cure; salt 1.8% in range.

process.note: Coarse-grind pork (75% lean/25% belly), season salt/black pepper/garlic (+nutmeg), stuff 36mm hog casing coil; grill/roast fresh. Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Classic fresh French pork sausage, uncured; source uses 1.5% salt, 18 (1.8%) still in range, kept.

process.note: Emulsify veal + pork back-fat cold, season salt/white pepper/mace/lemon/parsley/onion/cardamom; stuff 28-32mm casing; POACH ~80C water. Ground veal/pork core to 71C.

safe.note: Ground veal/pork -> 71C (poach ~35 min, water not boiling).

rationale: Fresh Bavarian white veal sausage, uncured (white = no nitrite); salt 1.8% in range.

process.note: Cook poultry+pork in broth, shred, bind with bread soaked in broth, garlic, paprika, olive oil; stuff, light cold-smoke; then fry/grill before eating. Contains POULTRY -> 74C.

safe.note: Poultry-content sausage -> 74C when fried/grilled to serve.

rationale: Portuguese bread+poultry sausage; traditionally lightly cold-smoked but eaten cooked fresh, no nitrite cure; salt 1.6% in range.

process.note: Coarse-grind pork, season salt/black pepper/mace/sage, bind with rusk+water; stuff as coil; pan-fry/roast/grill fresh. Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh English banger, uncured; salt 1.6% in range.

process.note: Grind pork shoulder (>=20% fat), season salt/garlic/marjoram/pepper; stuff hog casing; boil/grill/roast fresh. No nitrite (kept cold, cooked fresh = 'white'). Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh Polish white sausage; source explicitly states fresh version needs no nitrite; salt 1.8% in range.

process.note: Emulsify pork/veal + chicken breast + back-fat with onion, milk panade, egg/cream, salt/white pepper; stuff 36mm; POACH ~80C then fry/grill. Contains POULTRY -> 74C.

safe.note: Common recipe includes chicken -> 74C; poach then finish.

rationale: Fresh French white emulsion sausage, uncured; salt 1.5% in range; poultry content sets 74C floor.

process.note: Simmer pork shoulder + pork/chicken liver + trinity till tender, grind, mix with cooked rice (~2:1) + Cajun seasoning; stuff; steam/grill to heat. Pork+liver -> 71C (74C if poultry liver).

safe.ref: USDA ground pork (meat pre-cooked; 74C if poultry liver used)
safe.note: Filling cooked in prep; serve heated to 71C, 74C if made with chicken liver.

rationale: Fresh pork-and-rice boudin, uncured (meat fully cooked before stuffing); salt 1.6% in range.

process.note: Grind pork collar/belly/jowl, salt overnight, season salt/white pepper (+mace/nutmeg/cinnamon), stuff; grill/fry fresh. No blood, no cure. Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh Catalan white pork sausage, uncured; salt 1.8% in range.

process.ref: Basco Fine Foods — Guide to Chistorra
process.note: Fine-grind pork (or pork/beef, high fat 70-80%), season salt/garlic/paprika; thin lamb casing; grill/fry fresh. Ground pork/beef cook to 71C.

rationale: FLAG: traditionally a semi-/fast-cured Navarrese sausage (dried 1-5 days, some commercial versions add sodium nitrite); however it is eaten cooked fresh/grilled, so cure kept null for the fresh cook-and-eat version. Salt 1.8% in range.

process.note: Grind pork + beef (~1/3 beef) with fat, season salt/sweet paprika/garlic/black pepper/oregano, red wine+vinegar; stuff; grill on parrilla fresh (unsmoked, uncured). Ground pork/beef cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh unsmoked grilling chorizo (choripan), no cure; salt 1.8% in range.

process.note: Grind pork + fat, blend with ancho/guajillo chile paste, garlic, vinegar, cumin/oregano/clove/cinnamon; rest, cook loose fresh (not dried). Ground pork cook to 71C.

rationale: Fresh Mexican chorizo (vinegar/chile, cooked fresh unlike dry Spanish chorizo), no cure; salt 1.8% in range.
